title: Day 09 Resources
description: Official docs for debouncing, custom hooks, and generic TypeScript — read after building the movie search app.

resources.description: Official custom hook patterns and extraction rules.

resources.title: MDN — setTimeout
resources.description: Timer API used inside useDebounce implementations.

resources.description: Cleanup timers on every value change to prevent stale debounced updates.

resources.title: MDN — Event Loop
resources.description: Introduction to how timers and callbacks are scheduled — interview topic today.

resources.title: TypeScript — Generics
resources.description: Generic PaginatedResponse<T> and reusable API types.

resources.title: React — Adding Interactivity (Controlled Inputs)
resources.description: Controlled search input patterns from Week 1 applied to search UIs.

resources.title: TMDB — Getting Started
resources.description: Movie search API used in today's build — sign up for a free API key.

resources.title: MDN — AbortController
